style_effects: Molten lava glows from Venusaur's leafy crests, with ember sparks drifting upward in lazy spirals, crackling like tiny fireflies. An intense crimson aura pulses around its body, casting warm amber light that flickers through the air, while heat shimmer distorts the background in waves. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
